title: Evidence Item
description: Defines a concrete piece of operational telemetry, codebase scan log, or audit trace validating a control's operation.

id.description: Unique identifier of the evidence item (e.g. evi_1234).

control_ids.description: List of control identifiers this evidence item directly validates (references ctl_1234).

name.description: Name of the tool that emitted the evidence (e.g. caesar-ai-scan).

version.description: Semantic version of the emitting tool.

type.description: Classification or methodology of the generated proof.

payload_summary.description: Short, human-readable summary of the test or scan outcomes.

payload_details.description: Raw, structured logs or JSON payload emitted by the generator.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this evidence was generated.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for metadata extensions.
